articles.description: After Crystal Palace's issues last season, could a Premier League club lose their European place once again because of dual ownership issues?
articles.title: Premier League in Europe: Could a club lose their European place once again?

articles.description: Royal Lytham & St Annes in Lancashire will stage golf's oldest major for the 12th time.
articles.title: 2028 Open: Royal Lytham & St Annes to host tournament ahead of Turnberry and Muirfield

articles.description: Hannah Cox had never run before but set herself a target of 100 marathons in 100 days across India as a 'love letter' to her late father. Here's how she did it.
articles.title: London Marathon: Hannah Cox's 100 marathons in 100 days

articles.description: Netherlands attacking midfielder Xavi Simons says he is "heartbroken" after being ruled out for the rest of the season for relegation-battling Tottenham and this summer's World Cup because of a knee injury.
articles.title: Xavi Simons: Netherlands and Tottenham midfielder to miss rest of season and 2026 World Cup

articles.description: Elena Rybakina says she does not "trust" the electronic line-calling system following a disputed decision in her win against Zheng Qinwen at the Madrid Open.
articles.title: Elena Rybakina has no trust in electronic line-calling system after Madrid Open controversy

articles.description: In his first major interview since moving to Brazil, Jesse Lingard talks to the BBC about his new life, and Manchester United.
articles.title: Jesse Lingard interview: Former Man Utd man on Neymar, life in Brazil and his trophy target

articles.description: Did the Los Angeles Rams make a big mistake? Did the Las Vegas Raiders build enough around Fernando Mendoza? And could there finally be something to shout about for the two New York teams?
articles.title: NFL Draft 2026: Winners & losers with Fernando Mendoza, Ty Simpson, Jets & Giants

articles.description: Follow live text updates and listen to BBC Radio commentaries from nine games across Divisions One and Two of the County Championship.
articles.title: County Championship Cricket LIVE: Scores & radio commentaries from nine games

articles.description: The World Championship last-16 tie between Ronnie O'Sullivan and John Higgins is set for a dramatic end after the Scot closed the deficit to two frames.
articles.title: Ronnie O'Sullivan-John Higgins last-16 tie set for thrilling finish at World Snooker Championship

articles.description: Chelsea are in another FA Cup final - but only after their players showed up in a way they were no longer doing for Liam Rosenior, writes Phil McNulty.
articles.title: Chelsea 1-0 Leeds: Blues reach FA Cup final after Liam Rosenior sacking
